Text: Brilliant! We're set to finish right on schedule. Make sure you get plenty of rest afterwards!
At this rate, we'll never make any headway... Time to rethink our approach.
I know it's hard to envisage, but there'll soon be a magnificent hub right here!
The assignment is simple: clear the site of obstructions and tend to construction tasks!
Solid foundations, check. Eager contributors, check. Cosmoliner construction awaits!
Though we must first tend to the mini rovers. Go forth and recharge their depleted battery packs!
Contributors, are you ready? Our goal: a homely, heartwarming habitation module!
Of course, we'll need to make sure the mini rovers are fully charged before work begins in earnest!
If our interstellar aspirations are to get off the ground, we'll need a place to launch them! Time to build a cosmoport!
Alas, our fleet of mini rovers grows listless! Recharge them so that work may commence!
Time for an upgrade of galactic proportions!
Retrieve the components you need and assemble them on-site. Remember, only the highest quality will suffice!
Right, we're digging a tunnel clear through this place!
It'll be a tough job, so get ready to roll up your sleeves and put your back into it!
The ground here needs to be leveled in preparation for the lift. Your orders are to dig, collect, carry, and repeat!
It's a colossal task, but the more hands we have, the lighter the work will be!
We need to expand our energy generation facilities! Your job will be to monitor the mini rovers.
Keep an eye out for drained battery packs─get them recharged and back into the rovers as quickly as possible!
Next on the agenda is the expansion of our water supply systems! Our mini rovers are assembled and ready for this crucial task.
But a rover without power might as well be a paperweight, so make sure to keep those battery packs charged!
This is it─the final project! Let's get building!
Not far now. Keep up the pace!
When we're finished building on these foundations, we'll have the most cosmotastic hub you can imagine.
The assignment is simple: clear the site of obstructions and tend to construction tasks!
<whizz> <whirr>
